query: What are the TCAS3 score requirements for Computer Engineering?
answer:
Here's what I found for TCAS Round 3 (Direct Admission) for Computer Engineering at KU Bangkhen!

**Round 3 — Direct Admission (รับตรงร่วมกัน)**
- Seats available: 30
- GPAX minimum: 2.75
- Required exams: TGAT (Thai General Aptitude Test) + TPAT3 (Science & Technology)
- Score weights: TGAT 30%, TPAT3 70%
- Minimum TGAT score: 25 points
- Minimum TPAT3 score: 30 points

I'd recommend checking the official TCAS portal (mytcas.com) and the KU Faculty of Engineering website for the most current cut-off scores and deadlines. [Source: TCAS_round3_2567.pdf]
